reason: Verified agent communication and response correctness for simple math question
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Found agent "QA-20260504-145840-kd0c" in sidebar and clicked it — Agent loaded and displayed in main view
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" in the status indicator
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message entered in input field and sent via send button
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in approximately 2 seconds
Verified response mentions "4" and captured screenshot — Response clearly shows "4" as the answer to the math question
